category_sources: Official InfluxData documentation describes Kapacitor as an open source data processing framework for alerts, ETL jobs, and anomaly detection.
source_facts.description identifies Kapacitor as an open source time series data processor.
display_name_sources: Official InfluxData documentation and influxdata/kapacitor repository use Kapacitor.
docs_sources: Official InfluxData Kapacitor documentation is a dedicated docs section.
Official repository README is an additional official source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/influxdata/kapacitor, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official InfluxData docs list streaming/batch processing, alerts, ETL jobs, and anomaly detection.
source_facts.description says open source time series data processor.
